title: Real-Time Conversational Voice Bot with Turn Detection
description: A real-time conversational voice bot that listens through your microphone, transcribes speech, generates intelligent responses, and speaks back with natural turn-taking. Supports both local console mode and browser-based WebRTC sessions. Uses voice activity detection for natural interruption handling.

config.audio_flow: microphone → VAD → STT → Context → LLM → TTS → speaker
